title: LingoNote — Language Lesson Tracker
app_description: Record lessons, build vocabulary, and track what you learn — all saved locally on your device.
onboarding_subtitle: How are you using LingoNote today?
mode_student_description: Track lessons you've attended, review vocabulary, and save what your teacher shared with you.
mode_teacher_description: Plan your lessons, log student names, prepare vocabulary lists, and export notes to share.
feature_offline_desc: Everything is saved in your browser. No sign-up, no server, no internet required.
feature_vocab_desc: Log words with IPA, part of speech, meaning, translation, and usage examples.
feature_notes_desc: Capture lesson notes and reference links in a structured, easy-to-review format.
feature_export_desc: Export lessons as JSON to share with students or back up your data at any time.
footer_text: LingoNote — Learn smarter, one lesson at a time.
